title: Accuracy + non-partisan + sensitivity review of citizenship items (sign-off recorded)
context: MEDIUM risk-tier kill-gate: citizenship items do not ship without an accuracy reviewer's recorded sign-off. This task is the independent accuracy, non-partisan, and sensitivity review of the drafted citizenship items. Accuracy reviewer is TO BE SECURED (verifiedNeed=false).
objective: Run and record the accuracy/non-partisan/sensitivity review of the citizenship items with a version-scoped sign-off in the reviewers ledger.
acceptanceCriteria: Independent >= 10% spot-check finds 0 factual errors (any found -> block + root-cause); 0 items flagged as partisan/opinion or insensitive
Version-scoped sign-off recorded in the reviewers ledger before ship
